creator: bsdcode@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 255889
v2

I updated the patch to unbundle some fonts as suggested. In addition to the previously mentioned fonts I also used NotoColorEmoji.ttf from x11-fonts/noto-emoji for the expected NotoEmoji.ttf font.

Both BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS are required, or else the dependency on the fonts isn't registered in the package.
